title: oxera balansae
intro: Oxera balansae, also known as the Vietnamese mountain basil, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to Vietnam. Traditionally, Oxera balansae has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxera balansae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and aid in the treatment of respiratory infections. Oxera balansae can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Vietnamese medicine.
